meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: AgentX
products.tagline: Evaluate AI agent, pinpoint issues, and fix with one click.
products.summaryZh: 评估AI智能体，精准定位问题，一键修复。
products.descriptionZh: 在AI代理失败前进行评估。创建测试套件、运行评估，并在问题进入生产环境前精准定位。AgentX为您的AI代理提供全面可观测性与可追溯性。AI分析不仅能识别问题，还能提出修复建议——如同为您的代理配备AI医生。跨多个LLM提供商模拟运行您的代理，对比性能、成本与延迟，助您做出更优的LLM选型决策。部署前运行评估，如同为AI代理构建CI/CD流程。
products.description: Evaluate AI agents before they fail. Create test suites, run evaluations, and pinpoint issues before they reach production. AgentX provides full observability and traceability for your AI agents. AI analysis not only identifies problems but also suggests fixes-like an AI doctor for your agents. Simulate run your agents across multiple LLM providers to compare performance, cost, and latency, helping you make better decisions about which LLM to go. Run eval before deploy. Like CI/CD for AI agents.

products.name: Skybridge
products.tagline: The full-stack open source React framework for MCP Apps
products.summaryZh: 全栈开源React框架，用于构建MCP应用
products.descriptionZh: MCP 应用是新一代网站：它们是真实、可交互的应用，直接运行在 ChatGPT 和 Claude 等 AI 助手中。此前并不存在构建这类应用的工具，因此我们自行开发了。欢迎了解 Skybridge，这个 React 框架负责处理基础设施和开发循环，让你专注于功能开发：MCP 服务器、视图渲染、客户端兼容性、测试隧道等。一次编码，随处部署。已有超过 50 万次下载，数十款应用上架！
products.description: MCP apps are the new website: they're real, interactive apps that run right inside AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude. The tooling to build them didn't exist, so we built it. Meet Skybridge, the React framework that handles the infrastructure and the dev loop so you can focus on your features: MCP server, view rendering, client compatibility, testing tunnel, and more. Code once, ship everywhere. Already +500K downloads and dozens of apps in the stores!

products.name: HAQQ Legal AI on Mobile
products.tagline: Bringing legal understanding to anyone with a phone
products.summaryZh: 让每个拥有手机的人都能理解法律
products.descriptionZh: 我们打造HAQQ，是因为理解法律情境不应取决于你认识谁，或能否负担得起“直接问律师”。如今，HAQQ Legal AI已上线移动端。上传合同，提出法律问题，即可获得结构化、适配司法管辖区的法律分析，附带风险标记与可导出结果。这不是泛泛的聊天，而是由Justinian®驱动的法律推理。无论身在何处，都能清晰掌握自身处境。
products.description: We built HAQQ because understanding legal situations shouldn’t depend on who you know or whether you can afford to “just ask a lawyer.” Today, HAQQ Legal AI is available on mobile. Upload a contract. Ask a legal question. Get structured, jurisdiction-aware legal work with risk flags and exportable outputs. Not generic chat. Legal reasoning powered by Justinian®. Know exactly where you stand, wherever you are.

products.name: Alai 2.0
products.tagline: AI design partner for presentations, social posts, and more
products.summaryZh: AI设计伙伴，适用于演示文稿、社交媒体帖子等场景
products.descriptionZh: Alai 将您品牌的每一个细节都融入设计系统。您可以用它创建演示文稿、社交媒体素材、广告或任意尺寸的画布，所有内容都完美契合品牌形象。支持手动或通过 AI 进行精准编辑，并可自主选择 AI 模型，在成本、质量和响应速度之间取得平衡。
products.description: Alai captures every little detail about your brand in a design system. Use it to create presentations, social assets, ads, or any canvas size, all perfectly on-brand. Make precise edits manually or with AI. And choose your own AI models to balance cost, quality, and latency.

products.name: readywhen
products.tagline: Your 24/7 AI Chief of Staff for commitments and follow-ups
products.summaryZh: 你的24小时AI行政主管，负责承诺与跟进。
products.descriptionZh: 团队的工作分散在项目管理工具和CRM系统中，而高管的决策却零散各处。readywhen能捕捉Slack、邮件、会议和文档中的每一个决策与承诺。无需指令，它自动起草下一步所需内容：简报、邮件回复、进度更新。你只需确认批准。如同拥有专属的幕僚长，全天候待命。
products.description: Your team’s work lives in project management tools and CRMs. Your exec work is scattered. readywhen catches every decision and commitment across Slack, email, meetings, and docs. Without being asked, it drafts what’s needed next: the brief, the email response, the update. You just approve. It's like having your own Chief of Staff, 24/7.

products.name: Cloudflare Temporary Accounts
products.tagline: Let agents deploy before signup
products.summaryZh: 让智能体在注册前部署
products.descriptionZh: 当代理需要部署内容时，会直接撞上为人类设计的壁垒。今天我们推出Cloudflare Workers的临时账户功能。现在任何代理都能运行wrangler deploy — temporary，在数秒内获得一个可运行的Worker。
products.description: The moment an agent needs to deploy something, it slams face-first into a wall built for humans. Today we're rolling out Temporary Accounts on Cloudflare Workers. Any agent can now run wrangler deploy — temporary and get a live Worker in seconds.

products.name: uwait
products.tagline: Get paid while AI thinks
products.summaryZh: 在AI思考的同时获得报酬
products.descriptionZh: 每次使用ChatGPT或Claude时，你都需要等待。通常是3到8秒。就是这样。这就是核心思路。uwait是一款Chrome扩展程序，会在加载界面展示经过筛选的广告。你会获得一小部分分成。那些内容被用于训练AI的发布者也会获得分成。广告主则在你真正专注的时刻获得你的注意力。分成比例为：用户50%，发布者30%，我们20%。我们对广告主有严格筛选，只选择在当下场景中合理的品牌。
products.description: Every time you use ChatGPT or Claude, you wait. Usually 3 to 8 seconds. That's it. That's the idea. uwait is a Chrome extension that shows a curated ad during that loading screen. You get a small cut. The publishers whose content trained the AI get a cut too. The advertiser gets your attention at a moment when you're actually paying attention. The split: 50% to users, 30% to publishers, 20% to us. We're picky about advertisers. Just brands that make sense in that context.

products.name: AirJelly
products.tagline: Your Proactive, Self-Organizing Second Brain
products.summaryZh: 你的主动式、自组织第二大脑
products.descriptionZh: AirJelly 是一款始终在线的桌面AI助手，能主动捕捉你的意图、整理任务并推动执行。通过观察你的屏幕活动，它了解你的身份与工作内容。它不仅能识别待办事项，更能预判下一步行动并主动执行。同时追踪你的个人互动记录，让你永不遗漏后续跟进或遗忘承诺。生活中的一切事务都由AirJelly管理——为你释放时间，去做AI无法完成的事，或纯粹享受生活。
products.description: AirJelly is an always-on desktop AI agent that proactively captures your intent, organizes your tasks, and gets things done. By observing your on-screen activities, it knows who you are and what you're working on. It doesn't just spot your to-dos — it foresees what's next and acts. It also tracks your personal interactions, so you'll never miss a follow-up or forget a promise. Everything in your life is managed by AirJelly — freeing your time for what AI can't do, or simply for you to enjoy.

products.name: MediaSeg
products.tagline: Split large media files into upload-ready chunks on macOS
products.summaryZh: 在 macOS 上将大型媒体文件分割为可上传的小块
products.descriptionZh: MediaSeg 是一款 macOS 本地工具，可将大型媒体文件分割成适合上传的片段，同时保持画质。该工具完全借助 AI 辅助制作与指导，从构思到公开发布仅用两天时间完成。MediaSeg 最初为简化长录音上传准备而开发，适用于 NotebookLM 及其他有文件大小限制的上传平台。
products.description: MediaSeg is a local macOS utility that splits large media files into upload-ready chunks while preserving quality. It was produced and directed with full AI assistance, and shipped in 2 days from idea to public release. Originally created to streamline long-recording upload prep, MediaSeg is useful for NotebookLM and other size-limited upload destinations.

products.name: Clawd
products.tagline: A context-aware browser mascot with 100% local offline AI
products.summaryZh: 一个具备情境感知能力的浏览器助手，搭载100%本地离线AI
products.descriptionZh: 认识Clawd，这只真正懂你情绪的语境感知浏览器宠物。Clawd会在屏幕上爬行，感知网站情绪，并通过升级解锁140多种动画效果。它不只是一个吉祥物。你可以通过新增的语音聊天功能，用自定义角色（毒舌、Z世代）与它对话，支持Markdown格式和文字转语音。最重要的是，它完全离线运行且注重隐私保护，你的数据绝不会离开设备。Clawd是你最理想的浏览伴侣！
products.description: Meet Clawd, the context-aware browser pet that truly understands your vibe. Clawd crawls your screen, reacts to website sentiment, and levels up to unlock 140+ animations. He’s more than just a mascot. Use the new voice-enabled Chat to talk to him in custom personas (Sarcastic, Gen Z), complete with Markdown support and text-to-speech! Best of all? It’s 100% offline and privacy-first. Your data never leaves your machine. Clawd is your ultimate browsing companion!

products.name: MD+HTML Reader
products.tagline: Review AI-generated Markdown and HTML in a focused workspace
products.summaryZh: 在专注的工作区中审查AI生成的Markdown和HTML
products.descriptionZh: AI 编码工具能生成有用的文档，但审阅过程容易变得混乱。一个任务可能产生计划、API 笔记、QA 检查清单、交接文档、图表和 HTML 预览，这些文件散落在项目文件夹中，被源代码、构建产物、日志和依赖项淹没。MD+HTML Reader 为你提供一个专注的 macOS 工作空间，以只读模式审阅生成的 Markdown 和 HTML 文件，适用于下一个提示、提交或交接之前。
products.description: AI coding tools produce useful docs, but reviewing them can get messy. One task can leave plans, API notes, QA checklists, handoffs, diagrams, and HTML previews scattered across project folders and buried under source files, builds, logs, and dependencies. MD+HTML Reader gives you a focused macOS workspace to review generated Markdown and HTML in read-only mode before the next prompt, commit, or handoff.

products.name: Selector Forge
products.tagline: Browser extension for AI-generated resilient selectors
products.summaryZh: AI生成的弹性选择器浏览器扩展
products.descriptionZh: 浏览器扩展，利用AI生成可靠的CSS和XPath选择器。可用于为单个元素或元素数组创建选择器。生成的选择器具有"语义化"特性，能更好地适应页面变化！该扩展在GitHub上开源：https://github.com/Intuned/selector-forge
products.description: Browser extension to create reliable CSS and XPath selectors using AI. You can use it to create a selector for a single element or for an array of elements. The selectors it creates are meant to be "semantic" and more resilient to page changes! Extension is also open source on GitHub: https://github.com/Intuned/selector-forge

products.name: OnBrand by SlideSpeak
products.tagline: Design context for AI agents
products.summaryZh: AI代理的设计背景
products.descriptionZh: OnBrand通过MCP为AI代理提供设计上下文。添加你的品牌指南、Logo、色彩、图标、图像和幻灯片规则后，Claude、Codex和ChatGPT等工具便能生成真正符合你品牌的幻灯片、信息图及设计素材。不再有千篇一律的AI输出、随意的布局或偏离品牌的视觉内容。OnBrand可根据你现有的网站、品牌指南甚至PowerPoint模板，将整套品牌指南生成为design.md文件。
products.description: OnBrand gives AI agents design context through MCP. Add your brand guidelines, logos, colors, icons, imagery and slide rules, so tools like Claude, Codex and ChatGPT can create slides, infographics and design assets that actually match your brand. No more generic AI output, random layouts or off-brand visuals. OnBrand can generate your entire brand guidelines as a design.md from your existing website, existing branding guidelines or even PowerPoint templates.

products.name: Agentic Document Extraction
products.tagline: Make the world's documents computable
products.summaryZh: 让世界上的文档变得可计算。
products.descriptionZh: LandingAI致力于让全球文档实现可计算化。智能文档提取功能可帮助企业开发者大规模构建文档自动化流程。精准、可审计、API驱动的文档AI。
products.description: LandingAI is on a mission to make the world's documents computable. Agentic Document Extraction helps enterprise developers build document automation pipelines at scale. Accurate, auditable, API-driven document AI.

products.name: AlgoFly AI
products.tagline: The all-in-one place to build and deploy vision AI
products.summaryZh: 一站式构建和部署视觉AI的平台
products.descriptionZh: AlgoFly是一家AI咨询公司，帮助企业构建和部署AI解决方案。
products.description: AlgoFly is an AI consulting company that helps businesses build and deploy AI solutions.

products.name: LeadDelta 5.0: AI Warm Intros + AI Inbox
products.tagline: AI that finds Warm Intro Paths and fixes your LinkedIn Inbox
products.summaryZh: AI 可发现暖开场路径并修复你的领英收件箱
products.descriptionZh: LeadDelta 5.0 将团队的人脉关系整合至同一工作空间，由AI代理驱动实现以下功能：[#1] 理解你的人脉网络，包括其过往职位、技能及所有人际关联。[#2] 根据你的语气风格训练，为你起草并标注消息。[#3] 为你的重点客户、未来雇员或投资人寻找最温暖的引荐路径。此外，定制信息流仅展示关键人物的动态。统一收件箱，统一人脉网络，汇聚团队所有潜在温暖引荐。
products.description: LeadDelta 5.0 brings your team's relationships into one workspace, powered by AI agents that: [#1] Understand your network, their past roles, skills, and how everyone connects. [#2] Are trained in your tone of voice to draft and label your messages for you. [#3] Find the warmest intro paths into your top prospects, future hires, or investors. Plus custom feeds that surface posts only from the people who matter. One inbox. One network. Every warm intro your team is sitting on.

products.name: Glossary Extractor
products.tagline: Turn your content into a ready-to-use glossary in minutes
products.summaryZh: 将你的内容在几分钟内转化为可直接使用的术语表
products.descriptionZh: 每个严谨的本地化项目都需要术语表——而手动从内容中提取正确术语既缓慢又重复。该工具可自动完成此过程：上传文件，数分钟内即可获得结构化术语库，每个术语均附带定义、出现次数统计，若文件为多语言版本则包含翻译。它结合算法术语提取与AI清理优化，输出结果仅需快速审核即可投入使用。免费且无需注册。
products.description: Every serious localization project needs a glossary – and pulling the right terms out of your content by hand is slow, repetitive work. This tool does it for you: upload a file, get a structured term base back in minutes, with each term defined, counted, and (if your file is multilingual) translated. It pairs algorithmic term-finding with an AI cleanup pass, so the result is accurate enough to ship with just a quick review. It's free and requires no signup.

products.name: co/core
products.tagline: An AI cooperative. Local models on spare macs.
products.summaryZh: 一个AI合作社。利用闲置Mac电脑运行本地模型。
products.descriptionZh: co/core 是一个 AI 推理合作社——人们将已有的 Mac 汇集起来，为彼此运行开源模型，而非向大型云服务商租用资源。这是一场关于 AI 基础设施的实验，由我们共同构建、共享并拥有。你可以使用现有的兼容 OpenAI 的代码，也可以分享一台 Mac 来帮助运行。
products.description: co/core is a cooperative for AI inference — people pooling the Macs they already own to run open models for each other, instead of renting from the big clouds. An experiment in AI infrastructure we build, share, and own together. Bring your existing OpenAI-compatible code, or share a Mac and help run it.

products.name: radiusHQ link in bio and booking in one
products.tagline: Let clients book you straight from your bio.
products.summaryZh: 让客户直接从你的个人简介预约你。
products.descriptionZh: 别再让客户“私信预约”了。radiusHQ为服务专业人士提供品牌化的个人主页链接，客户可在页面上查看服务项目、价格并快速完成预约，无需网站。团队方案支持最多10名专业人员，采用公平负载分配，无按席位收费。10分钟即可完成设置。提供免费版本。
products.description: Stop telling clients to "DM to book." radiusHQ gives service professionals a branded link-in-bio page where clients see their services, pricing, and book in seconds — no website needed. Team plans cover up to 10 pros with fair-load routing, no per-seat pricing. Setup takes 10 minutes. Free tier available.

products.name: Photoroom API
products.tagline: Transform product images at scale with one image editing API
products.summaryZh: 使用一个图像编辑API批量处理产品图片
products.descriptionZh: Photoroom API 为全球领先的电商平台和品牌提供产品视觉支持，每年处理数十亿张图片——专为满足商业所需的快速、一致性和规模化而构建。从原始上传到精修、符合平台标准的首图和套装图，通过单一API流程即可生成所有目录素材。借助简洁的REST API和清晰的文档，数分钟内即可完成集成。企业级安全保障：您的图片不会被存储或用于模型训练。
products.description: Photoroom API powers product visuals for the world's leading marketplaces and brands, processing billions of images a year — built for the speed, consistency, and scale commerce demands. From raw upload to polished, marketplace-ready hero shots and bundles, generate every catalog asset in one API flow. Integrate in minutes with a clean REST API and clear docs. Enterprise-grade security: your images are never stored or used to train models.
